name: Christmas/holiday romance
desc: Set at Christmas or over another holiday period, such as New Year or Valentine’s Day. These stories can be cozy and heart-warming, with themes of family, love, hope, and healing.

name: Clean and wholesome romance
desc: Focuses on romance with no on-page sex. Characters might only share kisses, or intimate scenes take place behind closed doors. The emphasis is on the emotional relationship and feelings over physicality.

name: Contemporary romance
desc: Takes place in the modern day, with a real-world setting. This broad category includes various tropes such as sports, workplace, and billionaire/millionaire romance.

name: Cozy romance
desc: Defined by a cozy feeling, setting, or atmosphere. Often set in coffee shops, apothecary shops, or small towns during autumn or winter, these books tend to be low-stakes with an uplifting tone.

name: Fairy-tale romance
desc: Focuses on mythology, folklore, or fairy-tales. These romances are often retellings of popular stories or original plots loosely inspired by myths and legends.

name: Fantasy romance
desc: Combines fantasy elements with a primary focus on the love story. Characters live in or find themselves in a fantastical or supernatural world, overcoming obstacles to be together.

name: Gothic romance
desc: Combines Gothic fiction elements like dark, uncanny locations with romance. Features suspense, danger, and mysterious or brooding love interests who may hide dark secrets.

name: Historical romance
desc: Romances taking place in a historical setting. Popular eras include Regency, Viking, medieval, wartime, and Tudor periods.

name: Military romance
desc: Features characters in the military or ex-military. Common themes include long-distance separation, high-conflict situations, protective heroes, and adjusting to life back home.

name: New adult (NA) romance
desc: Follows characters between the ages of eighteen to their mid-twenties. Explores experiences like college, graduation, living independently, and early career struggles through the lens of a relationship.

name: Paranormal romance
desc: Includes elements of the supernatural. The romance usually involves a relationship between a human and a non-human creature such as a vampire, witch, werewolf, or faerie.

name: Romcoms (romantic comedies)
desc: Introduces comedy into a romance plot. These books are uplifting and focused on light-hearted themes, ranging from mild quips to outrageously funny plotlines.

name: Sci-fi romance
desc: Merges romance with sci-fi elements like futuristic or alien settings. Often includes action, danger, and high stakes set against a developing romantic relationship.

name: Small-town romance
desc: Set in a small town with a strong sense of community. Common elements include town gossip, local festivals, neighborhood cafes, and the 'outsider' trope.

name: Young adult (YA) romance
desc: Features characters in their mid-to-late teens. Explores coming-of-age themes, first love, crushes, and heartbreak, often with a sweeter tone than adult romance.
